hooks.command: CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',d).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$CMD" in *grep*|*rg\ *|*ripgrep*|*find\ *|*fd\ *|*ack\ *|*ag\ *)   [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] &&   echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: knowledge graph at graphify-out/. For focused questions, run graphify with: query \"<question>\" - scoped subgraph, much smaller than GRAPH_REPORT.md or grepping raw files."}}'   || true ;; esac

HIT=$(python3 -c "import json,sys;d=json.load(sys.stdin);t=d.get('tool_input',d);s=(str(t.get('file_path') or '')+' '+str(t.get('pattern') or '')+' '+str(t.get('path') or '')).lower().replace(chr(92),'/');exts=('.dart','.py','.js','.ts','.tsx','.jsx','.go','.rs','.java','.rb','.c','.h','.cpp','.hpp','.cc','.cs','.kt','.swift','.php','.scala','.lua','.sh','.md','.rst','.txt','.mdx');sys.stdout.write('1' if 'graphify-out/' not in s and any(e in s for e in exts) else '')" 2>/dev/null || true); if [ "$HIT" = 1 ] && [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: knowledge graph at graphify-out/. For codebase questions, use graphify: query \"<question>\" | explain \"<concept>\" | path \"<A>\" \"<B>\". Scoped subgraph - much smaller than reading source files. Read raw files only to modify code or when the graph lacks detail."}}'; fi || true

F=$(python3 -c "import json,sys;d=json.load(sys.stdin);print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); case "$F" in *.dart) command -v dart >/dev/null 2>&1 && dart format "$F" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true;; esac

cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" 2>/dev/null || true; CH=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.dart$" | head -1); if [ -n "$CH" ]; then echo '{"systemMessage":"Stop-gate: uncommitted .dart changes present -- run /audit (analyze + test), then /checkpoint or /ship-pr before wrapping up."}'; fi
